The '''[[Albino/Legends|Albino]] Cyclops''' was a deity of the [[Skakoan religion]] which lived in the [[Gates of Grontessiant]]. Its [[Eye of the Albino Cyclops|Eye]] was a sacred artifact, and it was guarded by the [[Lord Being of the Swirblies]] and four [[Four See Seers of the Cyclops|See Seers]].

{{Deity-stub}}
